verdict.rationale: The claim's EUR 13.05m matches only the regional 'Qualified commercial pipeline' (13.053m), but that document explicitly states its pipeline 'is not ranked against Finance' due to a different (local CRM) qualification basis, while the authoritative Finance Pack v2 final restatement reports 13.510m for the 'Qualified pipeline' for the same Q2 2026 actual period. The documents disclaim comparability rather than establishing an authority ordering, so the competing values cannot be resolved.
verdict.suggested_action: Determine which pipeline definition the master document intended (regional CRM-qualified vs Finance qualified) and reconcile against the 13.510m Finance figure and the 13.26m quarterly-update figure before accepting 13.053m.

evidence.span_text: Regional pipeline uses local CRM qualification and is not ranked against Finance.
The qualified pipeline stood at EUR 13.26 million entering the next quarter.

final_text:
I have enough to decide. The claim's EUR 13.05m (13,053,000) matches the regional document's "Qualified commercial pipeline" exactly — but that same regional document explicitly states its pipeline "is not ranked against Finance," and the authoritative Finance Pack v2 (final restatement, approved 15 July 2026) reports a different "Qualified pipeline" value of EUR 13.510m for the same Q2 2026 actual period. A third value (EUR 13.26m) appears in the quarterly update. The documents establish no authority ordering between the regional and finance figures — in fact they explicitly disclaim comparability — so this is an unresolved conflict.
